title: OriginClasses
description: This mod adds classes that benefits you throughout your journey
body:
Origin Classes adds a full class system inspired by Origins to Minecraft, letting players choose a powerful class that changes how they play the game.

Each class comes with unique abilities, strengths, weaknesses, and progression, making every playthrough feel fresh and strategic.

🧙 Available Classes

⚔️ Warrior – High strength and defense, built for close combat

🏹 Archer – Enhanced ranged damage and mobility

🧙 Mage – Special abilities and magic-based powers
(More classes can be added or expanded!)

✨ Features

Class selection menu (GUI)

Passive & active abilities per class

Balanced strengths and drawbacks

Multiplayer-friendly

Server & singleplayer support

Fully configurable

⚙️ Compatibility

Fabric Loader

Works with other Fabric mods

Designed for modern versions

📌 Why Use Origin Classes?

Adds RPG-style depth to Minecraft

Encourages team-based gameplay

Perfect for SMPs, survival worlds, and roleplay servers
